display.purpose: Landing hero headlines only — Cormorant Garamond.

headline.purpose: App titles and section headers — Syne or Inter semibold.

label.purpose: Mono kickers and technical labels — JetBrains Mono uppercase.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Task and kanban cards at rest.

shadows.name: pulse-glow
shadows.purpose: Accent glow on landing elements — rare.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transitions on buttons and cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action — start app, add task, confirm.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Mulai fokus<svg class="ds-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; background: #29a37a; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #248f6b; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #29a37a; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Toolbar and icon actions — theme toggle, overflow menu.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="16" height="16"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.93 4.93l1.41 1.41M17.66 17.66l1.41 1.41M2 12h2M20 12h2M4.93 19.07l1.41-1.41M17.66 6.34l1.41-1.41"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; padding: 8px; background: transparent; color: #13201b; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f1f4f2; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #29a37a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; background: #fbfaf9; color: #13201b; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e3e8e6; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f1f4f2; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #29a37a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Task Card
components.description: Primary task unit in list and kanban views.
components.html:
Review client brief
DesignJun 25 · 3:00 PM
components.css: .ds-task-card { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 14px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(227, 232, 230, 0.7); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-task-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-task-card:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-checkbox { width: 16px; height: 16px; border: 1px solid #e3e8e6; border-radius: 4px; margin-top: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-task-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #13201b; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-task-meta { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 6px; font-size: 12px; color: #5a6b64; } .ds-category { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #29a37a; }

components.name: App Header
components.description: Sticky top bar in the task app.
components.html: Wazheefa
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 16px; background: rgba(251, 250, 249, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(227, 232, 230, 0.6); } .ds-header-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-logo { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(41, 163, 122, 0.1); } .ds-brand-name { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #13201b; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-header-btn { height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #13201b; cursor: pointer; } .ds-header-btn:hover { background: #f1f4f2; }

components.name: Text Input
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Apa yang perlu diselesaikan?" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #fbfaf9; color: #13201b; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #e3e8e6; border-radius: 12px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5a6b64; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #29a37a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(41, 163, 122, 0.2); }

components.name: Priority Badge
components.description: Task priority indicator — high, medium, low.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-chip-high { background: rgba(220, 40, 40, 0.1); color: #dc2828; }

narrative.overview: Wazheefa's visual system is a calm, opinionated workspace for creators entering a focus session. It borrows Linear's fast, modern SaaS craft — crisp hierarchy, confident defaults, minimal chrome — but trades corporate coolness for warmth and editorial restraint on the landing surface. The app shell is utilitarian and quiet; the marketing layer may carry serif drama and atmospheric imagery, but the product register always wins inside /app.
keyCharacteristics: Emerald accent on tinted cool-green neutrals
Dual register: editorial landing vs. tool-grade app
12px base radius — softly rounded, never pill-everything

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Focus Emerald appears on ≤10% of any app screen — CTAs, active focus, selection. Its rarity signals intent.

rules.name: The No-Cream-Default Rule
rules.body: Do not reach for warm sand/cream/paper body backgrounds as a shorthand for friendly. Carry warmth through typography, imagery, or a committed color strategy.

rules.name: The Register Split Rule
rules.body: Serif display is forbidden inside /app. App surfaces use Inter + Syne only.

rules.name: The Kicker Restraint Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked mono labels are a landing accent, not section scaffolding. One kicker per page.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear as a response to elevation or hover — never as default decoration.

dos: Do use semantic tokens (bg-card, text-muted-foreground, border-border) — never raw hex in components.
Do keep Focus Emerald for actions and focus states only.
Do use text-wrap: balance on landing h1–h3.
Do test muted text contrast on cream and card surfaces.
donts: Don't use AI-default aesthetics: warm cream/sand body backgrounds, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, identical icon-card grids, uppercase eyebrow kickers on every section.
Don't use generic SaaS patterns: hero metrics, purple gradients, startup-template card grids.
Don't apply border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or alerts.
Don't use background-clip: text with gradients for headings.
Don't stack nested cards or default every list item into identical card containers.
Don't bring Cormorant serif display type into the /app task shell.
